description: Product Description Make your little one's birthday extra magical with this Dainty Unicorn Bunting Banner! Featuring a charming unicorn design and soft pastel "Happy Birthday" pennants, this banner is perfect for decorating party spaces and creating a whimsical atmosphere. Easy to hang and full of charm, it's the perfect finishing touch for a girl’s birthday party! Safety Warning CAUTION: This item is not a toy. Not suitable for use by children. For decorative use only.
